title: Instrument de ratification britannique
text_preview: George, be the Grace of God, of the United Tingdom of Great Ititain and Freland and of the JBritish Dominions begond the Seas king, Defender of the faith, Emperor of India, &c., dc., &c. To all and singular to whom tbese Presents sball come, Greeting! Mulbereas a Treaty between Us and the other Principal Allied and Associated Powers on the one part, and Poland, Roumania, the Serb-Croat- Slovene State and Czecho-Slov…

pages.text:
George, be the Grace of God, of the

United Tingdom of Great Ititain and Freland and of the JBritish

Dominions begond the Seas king,

Defender of the faith, Emperor of India, &c., dc., &c. To all and singular to whom tbese Presents sball come, Greeting!

Mulbereas a Treaty between Us and the other Principal Allied and Associated Powers on the one part, and Poland, Roumania, the Serb-Croat- Slovene

State and Czecho-Slovakia on the other part, relating to certain frontiers of these States, was concluded and signed at Sèvres on the Tenth day of August, in the year of Our Lord One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty, by the

Plenipotentiaries of Us and of the said Principal Allied

Powers and Czecho-Slovakia duly and respectively authorized for that purpose, Romania and the

Serb-Croat-Slovene State having since acceded to the said Treaty, which is, word for word, as follows:-

鼷

Vule, having

seen and

considered the

Treaty aforesaid, have approved,

accepted, and

confirmed the same in all and

every one of

its Articles and Clauses, as We do by these

Presents approve, accept, confirm, and ratify it for

Ourselves, Our Heirs and Successors; engaging and promising upon Our Royal Word that We will sincerely and faithfully perform and observe all and singular the things which are contained and expressed in the Treaty aforesaid, and that We will never suffer the same to be violated by any one, or transgressed in any manner, as far as it lies in Our power.

For the greater testimony and validity of all which, We have caused Our Great Seal to be affixed to these Presents, which We have signed with Our Royal Hand.

Givent at Our Court of St. James, the

First day of June, in the year of Our Lord

One Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty-one, and in the Twelfth year of Our Reign.

GrangeR.
